ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the team belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the performance belongs to */,
  "season" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Games played */,
  "w" INTEGER /* Wins */,
  "l" INTEGER /* Losses */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minutes played */,
  "off_rtg" REAL /* Offensive rating */,
  "def_rtg" REAL /* Defensive rating */,
  "net_rtg" REAL /* Net rating */,
  "ast_pct" REAL /* Assist percentage */,
  "ast_to" REAL /* Assist-to-turnover ratio */,
  "ast_ratio" REAL /* Assist ratio */,
  "oreb_pct" REAL /* Offensive rebound percentage */,
  "dreb_pct" REAL /* Defensive rebound percentage */,
  "reb_pct" REAL /* Rebound percentage */,
  "tov_pct" REAL /* Turnover percentage */,
  "efg_pct" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "ts_pct" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace */,
  "pie" REAL /* Player impact estimate */,
  "ppg" REAL /* Points per game */,
  "opp_ppg" REAL /* Opponent points per game */,
  "ppp" REAL /* Points per possession */,
  "opp_ppp" REAL /* Opponent points per possession */,
  "three_p_pct" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage */,
  "opp_three_p_pct" REAL /* Opponent three-point shooting percentage */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "opp_ft_pct" REAL /* Opponent free throw percentage */,
  "block_pct" REAL /* Block percentage */,
  "opp_block_pct" REAL /* Opponent block percentage */,
  "steal_pct" REAL /* Steal percentage */,
  "opp_steal_pct" REAL /* Opponent steal percentage */,
  "win_streak" INTEGER /* Current win streak */,
  "lose_streak" INTEGER /* Current lose streak */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the division belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of account creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last account update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: ID of the conference the team belongs to
ID of the division the team belongs to
City where the team is based
State where the team is based
Unique identifier for each performance entry
ID of the team the performance belongs to
ID of the conference the division belongs to
Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin)
Timestamp of the last account update
